Description: Tighten Sarbanes-Oxley control coverage across financial reporting after 2025 PCAOB findings.
Operationalize GDPR/CCPA consent capture, data subject rights, and erasure across customer systems.
Lift core SF origination workloads from on-prem to AWS landing zones with controlled egress.
Standardize metrics, logs, traces, and runbook integration across SRE-managed services.
Replace legacy API gateway with rate-limited, observability-first edge layer.
Annual PCI-DSS scope discovery and remediation tracking across card-handling systems.
Migrate batch workloads from regional DCs to AWS without re-architecting.
Operating-system patch and end-of-life upgrade backlog across the legacy fleet.
Pilot ML-driven customer sentiment analysis using support tickets and CSAT signals.
